data.title: SOL surges on network strength and bullish chart signals

data.title: SoftBank, Tether and Cantor Fitzgerald Launch Bitcoin-Focused Company Twenty One Capital
data.description:
Twenty One Capital, which positions itself as a “Bitcoin pure play”, aims to raise capital to accumulate the digital token and invest in related products and infrastructure.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/softbank-tether-and-cantor-fitzgerald-launch-bitcoin-focused-company-twenty-one-capital

data.title: U.S. Senate to Vote on Updated Stablecoin Regulation Bill
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Senate is scheduled to hold a procedural vote on the updated version of the stablecoin regulation bill, known as the 'GENIUS Act,' at 1:45 PM Eastern Time (1:45 AM UTC+8). The vote follows late-night negotiations and last-minute text updates between Senate Republicans and Democrats, setting the stage for a contentious decision.

Previously reported by BlockBeats, the 'GENIUS Act,' or the 'Guidance and Establishment of National Innovation in U.S. Stablecoins Act,' was introduced in the Senate on February 4, 2025. The legislation aims to establish a comprehensive regulatory framework for 'payment stablecoins' within the United States. Its objectives include promoting financial innovation, protecting consumers, preventing illicit financial activities, and reinforcing the U.S. dollar's dominance in the global financial system.

data.title: Raoul Pal Predicts Bitcoin's Dominance May Have Peaked
data.description: According to Foresight News, former Goldman Sachs executive and Real Vision founder Raoul Pal recently tweeted his belief that Bitcoin's dominance may have reached its peak today. Pal noted the presence of daily, weekly, and monthly DeMark top signals, with the current peak level falling below the highs of 2021, which were themselves lower than the 2017 highs. If this assessment proves accurate, it could signal the onset of the next phase of the 'Banana Zone,' referring to the altcoin season. Pal encouraged observers to watch developments closely.

data.title: Stripe Integrates Stablecoins and AI Technology – Will AI Agent Coins Like $MIND Benefit?
data.description:
Stripe, the global payment solution provider, has launched Stablecoin Financial Accounts. It’s a new feature that will allow users to hold cryptocurrencies in the form of stablecoins. Currently, Stripe only supports two dollar-denominated stablecoins: $USDC and $USDB. However, Stripe will introduce support for more stablecoins in the future
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/stripe-integrates-stablecoins-and-ai-technology-will-ai-agent-coins-like-mind-benefit/

data.title: A whale deposited 8.58 million USDC into Hyperliquid to buy ETH with 2x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale created a new wallet and deposited 8.58 million USDC to Hyperliquid, going long on ETH with 2x leverage. Its entry price was $1,930.41, and the current unrealized profit is $354,000.

data.title: Superstate launches “Opening Bell” to support SEC-registered stock issuance and trading on the blockchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Superstate announced the launch of the "Opening Bell" platform, which supports the direct issuance and trading of SEC-registered stocks on the chain. The project will be deployed first on the Solana chain to achieve the native integration of traditional equity and blockchain infrastructure. Superstate has recently joined forces with several institutions to submit a framework proposal to the SEC. (The Block)

data.title: Bitcoin miner Hut 8 grows hashrate 79% despite $134M quarterly loss
data.description:
Cryptocurrency mining firm Hut 8 increased its hashrate by 79% during the first quarter of the year. According to Hut8’s latest quarterly report released on May 8, the firm saw a net loss of $134. 3 million despite revenue of $21. 8 million
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/hut8-q1-2025-hashrate-expansion-loss?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Digital asset trading infrastructure GoQuant completes $4 million seed round of financing, led by GSR
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Digital asset trading infrastructure GoQuant announced the completion of a US$4 million seed round of financing, led by GSR, with participation from Copper.co, Lombard Odie, Capital Union Bank, TYR Capital and FRNT Financial. The new funds intend to support its construction of smart order routing to cover CEX, DEX and OTC transactions, and accelerate the growth of the global institutional market.

data.title: Space and Time mainnet launched, providing ZK proof data for data-driven crypto applications
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Space and Time announced that its permissionless public mainnet has been officially launched. It is reported that Space and Time is a blockchain network that provides ZK proof data, which aims to enable smart contracts to securely access and use verifiable data from on-chain and off-chain through its ZK coprocessor Proof of SQL. The platform is able to index major blockchain data such as Ethereum and off-chain information, and supports querying and analyzing these data. The launch of this mainnet aims to enable developers to build more complex data-driven on-chain applications.

data.title: Bitcoin Recovery Sees Over 3 Million BTC Return to Profit
data.description: According to Foresight News, analysis by Glassnode reveals that when the market neared a local low of $74,000, more than 5 million BTC were in a loss position. However, as the market has rebounded, this figure has decreased to approximately 1.9 million BTC, indicating that over 3 million BTC have returned to a profitable state.

data.title: BNB Chain: Working with MetaMask to fix the issue of transaction failure when setting the gas fee to less than 1 Gwei
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BNB Chain posted on the X platform that some users will experience transaction failures or stuck when setting the Gas fee to ＜ 1 gwei in MetaMask. We are currently working with the MetaMask team to fix it. The temporary solution can be turned off by turning off the smart transaction function. This problem only affects some system environments, but turning off the smart transaction function has successfully solved most cases.

data.title: UK and US agree terms of tariff trade deal
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The UK and the US have reached an agreement on the terms of a tariff trade agreement. The UK government agreed to make concessions on imports of US food and agricultural products in exchange for the US lowering tariffs on UK car exports. (CCTV)

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based SXT perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-based SXT perpetual contract, with a leverage range of 1-20 times, and the contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Binance Expands Support for Space and Time (SXT) Across Earn, Convert, Margin, and Futures
data.description: Key Points:Binance adds SXT to Simple Earn with a limited-time 66% APR offer for new users.SXT will be available on Binance Convert, Buy Crypto, and Margin trading starting May 8.Binance Futures to list SXTUSDT with up to 50x leverage.Binance has announced the comprehensive rollout of Space and Time (SXT) across its major product lines, including Simple Earn, Buy Crypto, Convert, Margin, and Futures, enhancing user access to one of the most anticipated data-warehouse-related tokens in the Web3 space.Binance Simple Earn: SXT Listed with 66% APR for New UsersStarting May 8 at 13:00 UTC, users can subscribe to SXT Flexible Products on Binance Simple Earn. Additionally, a limited-time promotional Locked Product will offer an exceptional 66% APR for 3 days.Offer Details:Token: SXTDuration: 3 DaysSpecial APR: 66%Min. Subscription per User: 1 SXTMax. Subscription per User: 500 SXTTotal Cap: 600,000 SXTNote: This offer is only visible to users who have never subscribed to Simple Earn Locked Products before May 8, 13:00 UTC.SXT Now Available on Buy Crypto and Convert with Zero FeesUsers can purchase SXT via VISA, MasterCard, Google Pay, Apple Pay, or Revolut under Binance’s Buy Crypto feature within one hour of the token's listing on Spot.On Binance Convert, SXT will also be tradable against BTC, USDT, and other supported tokens with zero fees, allowing instant swaps through the Convert interface.Margin Trading: SXT Available for Borrowing and LeverageAt 13:20 UTC on May 8, Binance Margin will enable SXT as a borrowable asset under both Cross and Isolated Margin modes. Trading pairs include:SXT/USDTSXT/USDCBinance Futures: SXTUSDT Perpetual Contract ComingBinance Futures will also launch the SXTUSDT perpetual contract, offering up to 50x leverage, providing derivatives traders with another way to gain exposure to SXT's price movements.What Is Space and Time (SXT)?Space and Time (SXT) is a decentralized data warehouse protocol that brings verifiable compute and data to smart contracts. The project has attracted institutional attention for its promise to provide secure, scalable, and tamper-proof data services for blockchain applications.

data.title: Twenty One Capital Emerges as a Strong Competitor in Digital Asset Acquisition
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Bloomberg reports that Twenty One Capital, a newly established digital asset joint venture involving SoftBank, Tether, and Cantor, is poised to become a formidable competitor in the market. Strahinja Savic, Head of Data and Analytics at FRNT Financial, highlighted the initial strength and backing of Twenty One Capital, noting its unique approach of utilizing capital markets available to public companies for acquiring Bitcoin.

Michael Saylor, founder of Strategy, commented that the emergence of new competitors validates his long-standing mission to persuade boards across the United States to maximize digital assets on their balance sheets. The number of companies following Saylor's lead is rapidly increasing, with at least 30 publicly listed U.S. companies currently purchasing Bitcoin.

Bernstein analysts predict that by 2030, corporate investments could channel $330 billion into Bitcoin, reflecting a significant shift in how companies manage their financial assets.
